subject: Verify current Main Flow auxiliary model visibility beyond Lane 1's 26 resolved refs

context.lane3_summary: The 26 Lane 1 requested refs are locally resolved. Direct parsing of the current workflow found 3 active auxiliary detector/preprocessor assets missing locally and 3 additional active SDXL LoRAs already present locally.

constraints: Do not start or stop EC2 on behalf of Lane 3.
Do not print secrets from C:\Comfy_UI\.env.
Do not commit ignored live state from Main\shared_state\ec2_requests.
Treat Lane 3 local path/hash evidence as file placement only; runtime dropdown/catalog/load visibility still needs proof.

requested_checks.requested_evidence: Confirm whether live ComfyUI/EC2 has this detector model at the expected path or visible to the node. If missing, return sanctioned source/restore action.
Confirm whether live ComfyUI has this SAM model visible/loadable. If missing, return sanctioned source/install path.
Confirm whether live ComfyUI has this DWPose model visible/loadable. If missing, return sanctioned source/install path.
Confirm these additional active SDXL LoRA names appear in the live LoRA catalog/dropdown. Lane 3 has local path/hash evidence for all three.

minimum_acceptance: Classify each auxiliary asset as runtime-visible, missing, or visible under an alternate path/display name.
For missing auxiliary assets, provide exact sanctioned source/restore path and owner lane.
Confirm whether the six metadata-only source strings identified by Lane 3 are non-runtime metadata and do not require dropdown visibility.
Record the workflow hash observed by Lane 4 so drift can be compared against Lane 3's 5C67A23D1F70A6E7A5687E99E58F73EA475A172B4736F32D192AB3929BC35EC9 parse.
